message:
feat(fp-frame): add Series.has_duplicates parity (frankenpandas-ijl4)

Adds Series::has_duplicates mirroring pandas' Series.has_duplicates
property. Complement of is_unique (multiple null entries count as
duplicates, matching is_unique's null_count <= 1 rule).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
